content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "昨天做了什麼",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你昨天做了什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zuótiān zuò le shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zuo2tian1 zuo4 le5 shen2me5?",
          "translation_en": "What did you do yesterday?",
          "translation_ko": "어제 뭐 하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我昨天早上先起床，然後刷牙洗臉，再吃早餐。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān zǎoshang xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu shuāyá xǐliǎn, zài chī zǎocān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zuo2tian1 zao3shang5 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 shua1ya2 xi3lian3, zai4 chi1 zao3can1.",
          "translation_en": "Yesterday morning I first got up, then brushed my teeth and washed my face, and then ate breakfast.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 이를 닦고 세수한 다음, 아침을 먹었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "然後呢？",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2hou4 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "And then?",
          "translation_ko": "그리고요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "然後我去公司上班，中午吃午餐，下午繼續工作。",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu wǒ qù gōngsī shàngbān, zhōngwǔ chī wǔcān, xiàwǔ jìxù gōngzuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2hou4 wo3 qu4 gong1si1 shang4ban1, zhong1wu3 chi1 wu3can1, xia4wu3 ji4xu4 gong1zuo4.",
          "translation_en": "Then I went to the company to work, ate lunch at noon, and continued working in the afternoon.",
          "translation_ko": "그리고 회사에 출근해서 점심을 먹고, 오후에는 계속 일했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你下班以後做了什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiàbān yǐhòu zuò le shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 zuo4 le5 shen2me5?",
          "translation_en": "What did you do after work?",
          "translation_ko": "퇴근 후에는 뭐 하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我下班以後先回家，然後煮飯吃晚餐，最後看電視休息。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiàbān yǐhòu xiān huíjiā, ránhòu zhǔfàn chī wǎncān, zuìhòu kàn diànshì xiūxí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 xian1 hui2jia1, ran2hou4 zhu3fan4 chi1 wan3can1, zui4hou4 kan4 dian4shi4 xiu1xi5.",
          "translation_en": "After work I first went home, then cooked and ate dinner, and finally watched TV and rested.",
          "translation_ko": "퇴근 후에 먼저 집에 가서, 밥을 해서 저녁을 먹고, 마지막으로 TV를 보며 쉬었어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did B do after getting up yesterday morning?",
          "question_ko": "B는 어제 아침에 일어난 후 무엇을 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Went to work", "Brushed teeth and washed face", "Ate lunch"],
          "options_ko": ["출근했다", "이를 닦고 세수했다", "점심을 먹었다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to each sentence and repeat it aloud, trying to match the tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about what you did yesterday. Use words like 先, 然後, and 最後."
    },
    {
      "title": "昨天晚餐吃了什麼",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你昨天晚餐吃了什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zuótiān wǎncān chī le shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zuo2tian1 wan3can1 chi1 le5 shen2me5?",
          "translation_en": "What did you eat for dinner yesterday?",
          "translation_ko": "어제 저녁에 무엇을 드셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我昨天晚餐吃了牛肉麵，還點了一份小菜。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān wǎncān chī le niúròumiàn, hái diǎn le yī fèn xiǎocài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zuo2tian1 wan3can1 chi1 le5 niu2rou4mian4, hai2 dian3 le5 yi1 fen4 xiao3cai4.",
          "translation_en": "I ate beef noodles for dinner yesterday, and also ordered a side dish.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 저녁에 소고기 국수를 먹었고, 반찬도 하나 주문했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "牛肉麵好吃嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Niúròumiàn hǎochī ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Niu2rou4mian4 hao3chi1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Was the beef noodles delicious?",
          "translation_ko": "소고기 국수는 맛있었어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "很好吃，可是有點辣。我點的是招牌牛肉麵。",
          "pinyin": "Hěn hǎochī, kěshì yǒudiǎn là. Wǒ diǎn de shì zhāopái niúròumiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hen3 hao3chi1, ke3shi4 you3dian3 la4. Wo3 dian3 de5 shi4 zhao1pai2 niu2rou4mian4.",
          "translation_en": "It was very delicious, but a little spicy. I ordered the signature beef noodles.",
          "translation_ko": "아주 맛있었는데, 조금 매웠어요. 시그니처 소고기 국수를 주문했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你喜歡吃辣嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xǐhuān chī là ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xi3huan1 chi1 la4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Do you like eating spicy food?",
          "translation_ko": "매운 음식 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我喜歡吃一點辣，可是不要太辣。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xǐhuān chī yīdiǎn là, kěshì bùyào tài là.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xi3huan1 chi1 yi1dian3 la4, ke3shi4 bu4yao4 tai4 la4.",
          "translation_en": "I like eating a little spicy, but not too spicy.",
          "translation_ko": "조금 매운 건 좋아하는데, 너무 맵지는 않았으면 좋겠어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did B eat for dinner yesterday?",
          "question_ko": "B는 어제 저녁에 무엇을 먹었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Rice", "Beef noodles", "Chicken"],
          "options_ko": ["밥", "소고기 국수", "치킨"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to each sentence and repeat it aloud, focusing on the tones and natural pauses.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me what you ate for dinner yesterday. Was it delicious? Was it spicy?"
    },
    {
      "title": "昨天出門去了哪裡",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你昨天出門去了哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zuótiān chūmén qù le nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zuo2tian1 chu1men2 qu4 le5 na3li3?",
          "translation_en": "Where did you go out to yesterday?",
          "translation_ko": "어디에 외출하셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我昨天下午出門去公園散步，然後去商店買菜。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān xiàwǔ chūmén qù gōngyuán sànbù, ránhòu qù shāngdiàn mǎicài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zuo2tian1 xia4wu3 chu1men2 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4, ran2hou4 qu4 shang1dian4 mai3cai4.",
          "translation_en": "Yesterday afternoon I went out to the park for a walk, and then went to the store to buy groceries.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 오후에 공원에 산책하러 나갔다가, 가게에 가서 장을 봤어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "公園人多嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Gōngyuán rén duō ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Gong1yuan2 ren2 duo1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Were there many people in the park?",
          "translation_ko": "공원에 사람이 많았어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "人不多，很安靜，天氣也很舒服。",
          "pinyin": "Rén bù duō, hěn ānjìng, tiānqì yě hěn shūfú.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ren2 bu4 duo1, hen3 an1jing4, tian1qi4 ye3 hen3 shu1fu2.",
          "translation_en": "There weren't many people, it was very quiet, and the weather was also very comfortable.",
          "translation_ko": "사람이 많지 않고, 아주 조용했으며, 날씨도 아주 쾌적했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你買了什麼菜？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ mǎi le shénme cài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 mai3 le5 shen2me5 cai4?",
          "translation_en": "What groceries did you buy?",
          "translation_ko": "무슨 채소를 샀어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我買了青菜、雞蛋和水果，然後回家煮飯。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ mǎi le qīngcài, jīdàn hé shuǐguǒ, ránhòu huíjiā zhǔfàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 mai3 le5 qing1cai4, ji1dan4 he2 shui3guo3, ran2hou4 hui2jia1 zhu3fan4.",
          "translation_en": "I bought greens, eggs, and fruit, and then went home to cook.",
          "translation_ko": "채소, 계란, 과일을 샀고, 집에 가서 밥을 했어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where did B go first yesterday afternoon?",
          "question_ko": "B는 어제 오후에 먼저 어디에 갔습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Store", "Park", "Home"],
          "options_ko": ["가게", "공원", "집"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to each sentence and repeat it aloud, paying attention to the flow of the conversation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me where you went out to yesterday. What did you do there? Was the weather nice?"
    }
  ]
}
